ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., boardgame, cardgame) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "year_published" INTEGER /* Year the game was published */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players required */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed */,
  "playing_time" INTEGER /* Average playing time in minutes */,
  "min_playtime" INTEGER /* Minimum playing time in minutes */,
  "max_playtime" INTEGER /* Maximum playing time in minutes */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age recommended for the game */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the game's main image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  "msrp" REAL /* Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the game in grams */,
  "is_expansion" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the game is an expansion */,
  "parent_game_id" INTEGER /* If the game is an expansion, this column will reference the game_id of the base game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last update of the game record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_parent_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, reviewer, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user joined */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON field to store user preferences (e.g., preferred game categories, playtime) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Optional review text provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rating was given */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the rating is anonymous */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review has been flagged for inappropriate content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_categories" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "designer_name" TEXT /* Name of the designer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_designers" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_publishers" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "publisher_id")
)
column_names: Type of the game (e.g., boardgame, cardgame)
